arts.ttl: Papers: Man Utd forward Rashford still targeting Barcelona move
arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Sunday's newspapers...

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim embargoed press conference ahead of Spurs away
arts.sum: I’m just focused on my players and my problems. People are losing their jobs so we have to acknowledge that the biggest problem is the football team.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim takes responsibility for big job cuts at Manchester United
arts.sum: Manager admits job losses are ‘affecting the environment’ Fresh blow as Amad Diallo ruled out for rest of season Ruben Amorim has acknowledged he and the first team must shoulder the blame for Manchester United’s failings as a football club that have resulted in swathes of employees being made redundant. Sir Jim Ratcliffe, the minority owner, is set to remove a further 200 staff roles at Old Trafford as part of cost-cutting exercises to address years of financial mismanagement and put them back on a firmer footing. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: 'We are responsible' - Ruben Amorim and Manchester United players take blame for Ineos redundancies
arts.sum: Sir Jim Ratcliffe is set to make more redundancies at Man Utd and head coach Ruben Amorim says the blame for the job losses lies with the first team.

arts.ttl: Spurs v Man Utd: Bosses agree Amorim under most pressure
arts.sum: Manchester United's Ruben Amorim and Tottenham's Ange Postecoglou talk about the pressure at both clubs going into Sunday's mid-table battle.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim insists Man United squad must take responsibility for brutal job losses as Sir Jim Ratcliffe continues to wield the axe amid latest cost-cutting measures
arts.sum: JOE BERNSTEIN: United co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe is overseeing massive changes at the club with more redundancies and increased ticket prices being considered to offset reported losses.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot compares Mohamed Salah to Man United legend as Liverpool boss reveals the secret power that has given Anfield hero the edge over Premier League defences
arts.sum: At 32, Liverpool superstar Salah is a 'good age' with the physical capabilities of playing twice a week alongside the savvy gained from nearly 700 games in senior football.

arts.ttl: Kevin Danso sends Tottenham dressing room message after triple Man Utd injury boost
arts.sum: TOTTENHAM vs MANCHESTER UNITED: Kevin Danso has already played two games for Spurs since his arrival from Lens but he is yet to taste victory following successive cup defeats to Liverpool and Aston Villa, respectively

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim names Man Utd's 'biggest problem' in response to Sir Jim Ratcliffe's job cuts
arts.sum: Ruthless Manchester United minority owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe is set to make up to 200 more staff redundant, on the back of the 250 job cuts he oversaw at the club last autumn

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim makes worrying Man Utd sack admission and reveals his biggest weakness
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim is under pressure after seven defeats in 13 Premier League games have left his struggling side down in 13th place in the table
